title: The Wiggles Holdings Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: The Wiggles Holdings Pty Ltd admitted its button-battery-powered Emma Bow headband, sold to children between June 2022 and March 2024 (3,164 units), likely breached the mandatory button-battery warning requirements of the Australian Consumer Law. The product was recalled in August 2024, and the company gave the ACCC a court-enforceable undertaking including a commitment to produce a public-awareness podcast episode on button-battery risks.
scope: Admitted a children's product likely breached mandatory button-battery safety warning requirements; Gave a court-enforceable undertaking to the ACCC following a product recall
